name: yt-batch-manager-web
description: YouTube Batch Manager to manage the videos in your channel in a single page.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r src/i18n/*.json dist/ && cp -r docs dist/ && cp assets/icon.svg dist/ && (cp src/credentials.json dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && npm run build:docs
scripts.build:watch: tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r src/i18n/*.json dist/ && cp -r docs dist/ && cp assets/icon.svg dist/ && (cp src/credentials.json dist/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "npm run build:watch" "npm run serve"

author: Jiyong Youn
